Interface IItemURIFilter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an item URI filter.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("7AAF922E-A33F-4628-9040-EA408E7A747C")]
public interface IItemURIFilter

Properties

Name

The name of the item URI filter.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportedTemplateNames

The list of supported template names.

IStringArray SupportedTemplateNames { get; set; }

Property Value

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportsOrthorectification

Indicates whether the item URI filter supports ortho-rectification.

bool SupportsOrthorectification { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ApplyFilter(IItemURI) 

bool ApplyFilter(IItemURI pItemURI)

pItemURI IItemURI
